title: Chocolate Tasting and Watercolor Workshop
description: Taste With Color is a hands‑on chocolate tasting where we explore flavor through color rather than complicated tasting terms. You’ll taste four chocolates, use the Taste With Color flavor map to choose the colors each flavor evokes, and then create simple watercolor paintings inspired by your impres…

title: In-Person Group Event: Cultivate More Self-Love, Joy, & Compassion
description: The Love Meditation: A Heart-Opening Journey to Self-Love and Connection 💰 Although Eventbrite shows this as a free event, there is a $20 fee to participate Please send payment via Venmo to @wendy-shlensky and note: for Gaby Goldman event.

title: The Rooms We Inhabit
description: The Rooms We Inhabit A Bureau of Play Panel on Space, Atmosphere, and Agency The spaces we inhabit shape more than our surroundings. They shape our mood, our behavior, our relationships, and our sense of belonging and possibility.

title: Dance Social Club x Red Bull: Tate McRae
description: ‼️ TO RESERVE YOUR SPOT, YOU MUST PURCHASE A TICKET IN THE LINK ABOVE - Partiful RSVP count may not be accurate! If you can't make this date, there is another one on Thurs, 5/7: https://partiful.com/e/Aql7YwRttcaySO1GUjMB 🎵 Tate McRae warmup playlist + main combo 👯‍♀️ These are dance socials!

title: Talent Show for Adults | Brooklyn Bowl
GWM Book Club 📚💛
description: Join us for an in-person evening of meaningful conversation and connection, guided by the wonderful @bookmarked.byv. By signing up, you’re committing to get your own copy of the book "The Song of Achilles" by Madeline Miller and attend the scheduled meetup.

title: Arts Gowanus presents: Storytelling Night as part of Trans Art Fest
description: This event features a lineup of trans storytellers--with time for audience participation! If you'd like to enter your name for a chance to be randomly chosen to perform a story that's less than 5 minutes long, sign up here.

title: Dance Social Club: Hannah Montana
description: ‼️ TO RESERVE YOUR SPOT, YOU MUST PURCHASE A TICKET IN THE LINK ABOVE 🎵 Hannah Montana warmup playlist + main combo. A night of nostalgia and healing!!! 👯‍♀️ These are dance socials! No experience needed!

title: Perfectionism: Discovering your LIFE on the other side
description: PSA: 📣 We've been DUPED into thinking perfectionism is a high standard. A work ethic. Just a sign that you care a lot. It isn't. It's the thing standing between you and the life you deserve to live. What it's about You stall on something you care about because it isn't "ready.

title: The Psychedelic Assembly: Find the Others
description: "Who knows what you might learn from taking a chance on conversation with a stranger? Everyone carries a piece of the puzzle. Nobody comes into your life by mere coincidence. Trust your instincts. Do the unexpected.

title: 🎈Let’s Play: Games for Reframing, Positivity and Connection
description: 🥳 Start 2026 with new friends! We'll play simple, silly group games designed to bring out your inner child, undo self-limiting beliefs, reframe any situation in a positive light, remove self-criticism and judgment, and build authentic foundations to create more organic, meaningful relationships ❤️ ✨…

title: Ego Free Jam
description: A night of improvisational sound and music for musicians and non-musicians alike, in a beautiful and cozy space. Bring your own instruments or use the venue’s. Play, move your body, or just tune into others during two journeys, each lasting about two hours. No spectators. Shoes off.

title: Of Fire + Flowers; a Beltane Birthday
description: Come all, and embody the creature within... Join the Youtopia fam in celebrating the birthdays of Levonah and K; where you’ll dance off the winter to bloom, connect, howl and flutter to your heart’s content, when the veil is most thin 🤍 For this party to be at full power, we need your unique magic!

title: Saved by the Booty '26
description: The hottest 90’s party returns 🔥 Our second year collaborating with Butt Disco to bring 2 rooms of 🍑 shaking beats The Booty Hall Monitors will be issuing Booty Passes and Booty Detentions 👀🔥 Don your neon and wacky shaped clothing. Your scrunchies. Your wild hair. Slap bracelets.

title: Seeding Songs of Resistance
description: *** Meet at 1:15 at meet in the lobby of the Brooklyn Central Library! In times of great change, in moments of collective grief or courage, music can be a lifeline — a way to connect, to center, to uplift, to resist, and to sing ourselves towards justice.

title: Collective Care Lab - May: Play with Anxiety
description: Collective Care Lab Designed and led by Aurélie Harp — Wemanity Coaching If you’re tired of moving forward alone, or feeling lonely, or want to do something new and with others, this is for you. Collective Care Lab is a monthly, facilitated 90-minute group gathering at Fabrik.

title: Reading Rhythms Williamsburg: May 4th
description: You’re invited! Reading Rhythms is a series of welcoming reading parties designed to make it easy for people to gather and read socially. We invite you to bring any book you want and facilitate silent reading periods, as well as 1-on-1 breakouts, and group discussions to pull on the threads of the b…

title: Nervous System Reset
description: A 6-week journey to feel calm, grounded, and back in control of your life Reset your body. Reconnect to yourself. Most people don’t realize it—but the way you feel day to day isn’t just “who you are.” It’s your nervous system.

title: Frequently Questioned Answers (FQA)
description: Photo: Seed of Dreams by Martin Taylor and the Chromaforms Art Collective, 2022 May 6th, we have a very special offering, a free Burning Man Info Session and Mixer, for new and veteran burners alike.

title: The Feels NY ed 67: a mindful singles event in NYC
description: // about \\ ‘the feels’ is a 3-hour in-person dating event in NYC, designed for people who want more intentional, embodied ways of meeting and connecting with others.

title: Self-Love Is In The Air
description: Summer is coming and everyone's thinking about their ideal beach body. But have you thought about your emotional summer body? Because guess what! We only look as impressive as the self-worth we carry.

title: "Time After Time" - Cyndi Lauper | One-Day Choir
description: WHAT IS A ONE-DAY CHOIR? Gaia Music Collective's One-Day Choir series is an opportunity to sing in a choir for one day only. A celebration of song and the connective power of singing in harmony. An opportunity to build community, make some new friends, and raise our powerfully diverse voices as one.

title: (Special Event!) "Reading Under Fire" Reading Party
description: You’re invited! Join this special, one-of-a-kind reading party extravaganza in partnership with Poster House to celebrate the museum's new exhibition "Reading Under Fire.

title: Plus-One Party™: Los Angeles [admits 2]
description: We're finally here: join us for our LA launch party on May 7th 🥂 Everyone says they want to meet someone "through friends," and we help make it happen. Grab a pal and join us for a dating event with a twist: everyone brings a great single friend for someone else to meet!

title: Design in Bloom: Rooftop Brunch & Guided Tour at MAD
description: On Saturday May 9th, you’re invited to join us for an art-full afternoon featuring guided visits of two vibrant, design-forward exhibits at the Museum of Art & Design, as well as an indoor, rooftop brunch.

title: Brooklyn Astrology Club @ Commune Cafe & Wine Bar
description: Welcome to Astrology Club at Commune Cafe & Wine Bar! "As Above, So Below" Astrology is the study of celestial movements and their correlations with earthly events. We're coming together to learn about the foundations of astrology to help build a practice for ourselves.

title: Femme Naked Yoga
description: What if your workout built confidence, strength & body freedom? Sweat, breathe, and reconnect with your body—your way. What if your workout energized you—physically, emotionally, and confidently?

title: Candlelight CircleSing
description: These sessions are the heart of what we've been building here at Gaia - warm, welcoming spaces for spontaneous singing and harmonizing, led with joy, passion, and kindness by skilled circlesong facilitators.

title: CW NYC: Pitch-a-Community Night
description: You've got an idea. Let's see who wants to be the first to join you! Community Week NYC (May 9-17) is a citywide celebration of belonging that spotlights the organizers, spaces, and communities conne...

title: Reading Rhythms Midtown: May 11th
description: You’re invited! Reading Rhythms is a series of welcoming reading parties designed to make it easy for people to gather and read socially. We invite you to bring any book you want and facilitate silent reading periods, as well as 1-on-1 breakouts, and group discussions to pull on the threads of the b…

title: SEE NYC
description: See NYC is a multiday summer camp-style gathering designed for New York Leaders. See NYC is a place to learn about the city from new perspectives, build meaningful relationships, and spotlight New York’s genius through experiential programming.

title: Workshop:  Small Bets, Big Clarity - Designing tiny experiments to try a new direction
description: What Does Success Look Like? Let’s Test It. You don’t need a 5-year plan. You need a 3-week experiment. Most of us wait for certainty before we make a move — the right moment, the full picture, the perfect plan. But clarity doesn’t come from thinking harder.

title: Word Play Social: May the Words Be With You
description: A long time ago in a galaxy far, far away…they probably still played Scrabble. Spring is in the air - and so is the sweet sound of a clicking tiles and cheers! Join us for our May gathering, a friend...

title: THE PLAYERS CLUB: An Evening with Debut Author Rachel Mills
description: If you could be anyone — who would you dare to become? That's the question at the heart of The Players Club, the debut novel by Rachel Mills — and our May Pick of the Month. We're throwing a reading party around it.
